docs.title: 🎯 About the Course
docs.text: This course covers advanced computational techniques for analyzing fluid flow. Topics include finite difference methods, finite volume methods, and applications to various fluid dynamics problems. Students will learn to implement numerical solvers and visualize complex flow patterns.

docs.title: Assignments
docs.text: No Date Topic Assignment 01 TBD Finite Difference Implementation Assignment 1

docs.title: 📚 Lecture Schedule
docs.text: No Release Date Topic Materials 01 TBD Introduction to Fluid Flow Lecture 1

docs.title: Module 1: Introduction to Fluid Dynamics and Computation
docs.text:
• Governing equations of fluid flow
  • Classification of PDEs
  • Overview of numerical methods

docs.title: Module 2: Finite Difference Methods
docs.text:
• Taylor series expansion
  • Consistency, Stability, and Convergence
  • Applications to heat equation and wave equation

docs.title: Module 3: Finite Volume Methods
docs.text:
• Integral form of conservation laws
  • Discretization of the diffusion term
  • Discretization of the convection term

docs.title: Module 4: Numerical Solution of Navier-Stokes Equations

docs.title: Lab 1: Introduction to Fluid Flow Simulations¶
docs.text: This notebook will introduce you to basic computational fluid dynamics (CFD) concepts.
